description_long: This is a small, vintage-style gas station building with a red gabled roof and light green walls, situated on a circular patch of ground with a paved road section. The front features a central entrance door flanked by two classic red fuel pumps, each with visible hoses and nozzles. Above the door, a sign reads 'Grocery', indicating a combined convenience store and fueling station. The building has a single chimney and small windows on the sides, with no visible canopy structure over the pumps. The surrounding area is grassy with some worn patches, and the paved road runs along one side of the property. The overall appearance is quaint and reminiscent of early to mid-20th-century rural gas stations.
description: A small, vintage gas station with a red roof, green walls, two red fuel pumps, and a 'Grocery' sign above the entrance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the entrance door, 'Grocery' sign, and two red fuel pumps prominently displayed.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the building's length, a single fuel pump, and the adjacent paved road.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain back wall, chimney, and no visible pumps or signage.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a single fuel pump and the paved road, no entrance or signage visible.
attribute_fuel_pumps: Two vintage-style red fuel pumps are present at the front of the building, each with visible hoses and nozzles. The pumps are positioned symmetrically on either side of the entrance, with no visible digital displays or branding.
attribute_station_signage: A single sign above the entrance reads 'Grocery' in red letters on a white background, with a small circular logo above it. No other signage is visible.
attribute_convenience_store_entrance: The convenience store entrance is located at the center front of the building, featuring a single manual door with a window. The door is framed by the 'Grocery' sign above and is flanked by the two fuel pumps.
